steps.title: Identify the given minimum and maximum distances
steps.content: The problem states the dragonfly traveled a minimum of 1,510 miles and a maximum of 4,130 miles. So the distance d must be at least 1,510 and at most 4,130. $$1510 \le d$$ and $$d \le 4130$$.

steps.title: Combine into a compound inequality and match the choice
steps.content: From the two inequalities we have $$1510 \le d$$ and $$d \le 4130$$. Combining them gives the compound inequality $$1510 \le d \le 4130$$. That matches choice B - B is correct.
